name: Revenue Growth Rate
description: Revenue Growth: (Current Period Revenue - Previous Period Revenue) / Previous Period Revenue.

name: Cross-sell/Upsell Conversion
description: Upsell Rate: (Number of existing clients purchasing new services / Total number of active clients) * 100.

name: Net Promoter Score (NPS)
description: Client Advocacy Score: % of Promoters - % of Detractors.

name: Perfect Billing Rate
description: Billing Accuracy and Timeliness: (Number of invoices sent on time without errors / Total invoices sent) * 100.

name: Budget Variance
description: Budget Utilization Efficiency: (Actual Spend / Approved Monthly Plan) * 100.

name: Margin Improvement
description: Resource Calibration Impact: (Project Margin After Calibration - Project Margin Before Calibration) / Margin Before Calibration.

name: Strategy Win Count
description: Market Intelligence Success: Total count of pitches or campaigns won where data insights were cited as the key success factor.

name: Forecast Deviation Rate
description: Forecast Accuracy: Absolute value of (Actual Revenue - Forecasted Revenue) / Actual Revenue. (Lower is better)

name: Lead-to-Deal Ratio
description: Lead Conversion Rate: (Number of Closed Deals / Number of Qualified Leads) * 100.

name: New Business Revenue / GMV
description: New Revenue Contribution: Sum of Total Contract Value or GMV from new clients.

name: Commission to Revenue Ratio
description: Commission Efficiency: (Total Commissions Paid / Total Revenue/GMV Generated) * 100.

name: Average Sales Cycle Length
description: Pipeline Velocity: Average number of days from Lead Identification to Contract Signed.

name: Delivery OTIF (On-Time In-Full) Rate
description: OTIF Rate: (Number of campaigns delivered 100% complete by the deadline / Total campaigns delivered) * 100.

name: Optimization Count
description: Optimization Frequency: Total count of documented interventions/adjustments made to live campaigns.

name: COGS Margin Adherence
description: Financial Control: (Actual COGS / Revenue) compared to (Target COGS / Revenue).

name: Business Revenue / GMV
description: Revenue Contribution: Sum of Total Contract Value or GMV from managed clients.

name: Average Daily GMV
description: BAU Performance: Total GMV generated on non-campaign days / Number of non-campaign days.

name: Campaign Uplift Factor
description: Big Sale Uplift: ((Big Sale GMV - Average Daily GMV) / Average Daily GMV) * 100.

name: Average View Duration
description: Audience Retention: Total Time Watched by all viewers / Total Number of Views.

name: Click-to-Order Rate (CTOR)
description: Conversion Efficiency: (Total Orders / Total Product Clicks in stream) * 100.

name: Net WCA Creator Growth
description: Supply Growth: ((Total End - Total Start) / Total Start) * 100.

name: Return on Investment per Creator
description: Creator ROI: (Total GMV Generated by WCA Creators / Total Investment in WCA Creators) * 100.

name: Active Supply Count
description: Creator Utilization: Count of unique WCA creators who have been booked or utilized.

name: Supply Efficiency Rate
description: Utilization Rate: (Number of Active WCA Creators / Total Available WCA Creators in the Pool) * 100.

name: Platform Incentive Revenue (WCA)
description: Income Revenue from Platform: Sum of all direct revenue earned from the platform for WCA.

name: Net Creator Acquisition Rate
description: Growth of New Creators: ((Number of Active Creators End - Number Start) / Number Start) * 100.

name: Performance Improvement Rate
description: Growth of Creator Performance: ((Avg Views/Engagement Current - Avg Previous) / Avg Previous) * 100.

name: Platform Incentive Revenue (CM)
description: Income Revenue from Platform: Sum of all direct revenue earned from the platform.

name: Creator Cost Inflation Rate
description: Inflation for Mid & Top Creator: ((Avg Cost Current - Avg Cost Previous) / Avg Cost Previous) * 100.

name: Average GMV per Creator Growth
description: GMV/Creator: ((Current Avg GMV - Previous Avg GMV) / Previous Avg GMV) * 100.

name: Actual Sales GMV
description: Based on Screenshot Table - Actual GMV Sales Achievement

name: New Brands Acquisition
description: Based on Screenshot Table - Actual New Brands Acquired

name: Managing Existing Brands
description: Based on Screenshot Table - Actual Managing Existing Brands

name: Booking Variance
description: Accrual Accuracy: Absolute value of (Booked Revenue/Cost - Actual Bank Statement Amount).

name: On-Time Payment Rate
description: Vendor Liability Management: (Number of payments made within agreed terms / Total number of payments) * 100.

name: Budget Variance Ratio
description: Forecasting Precision: (Actual Financial Results - Forecasted Results) / Forecasted Results.

name: Compliance Defect Rate
description: Compliance and Reporting: Number of late tax filings or internal audit flags.

name: Average Turnaround Time
description: Document Processing Speed: Sum of hours spent processing documents / Total documents processed.

name: Data Error Rate
description: Data Entry Integrity: (Number of entries with detected errors / Total entries made) * 100.

name: Opex Budget Utilization
description: Expense Tracking: (Actual Operational Expense / Budgeted Operational Expense) * 100.

name: Mean Time to Resolve (MTTR)
description: Support Responsiveness: Average time taken to close internal finance tickets/queries.
